title: Facilities Construction: Construction Manager-At-Risk
description: Conroe ISD uses this policy to guide how it hires and works with a construction manager when building or renovating school facilities using a "construction manager-at-risk" approach. Under this method, a professional construction firm takes on responsibility for completing projects on time and within budget, helping protect taxpayer dollars. Community members can trust that clear rules are in place to ensure school construction projects are managed fairly, transparently, and in the best interest of students and the district.
